subject: New Request: Microservices Engineer
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from NordCast, a company in the telecom/media space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Microservices Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:

  • Java
  • MongoDB

Practical details:

  • Start: 2021-02-13
  • Duration: 3 months
  • Location: Malmö (remote)
  • Rate: up to 925 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
David Karlsson
Head of Staffing
Agile Minds
Tel: +46 70 890 12 34
